vendor.name: Prairie Beauty Supply
vendor.supplies: Polish, gels, dip systems, cuticle oil, gloves

vendor.name: NailPro Wholesale
vendor.supplies: Acrylic powder, top coats, nitrile gloves
vendor.standing: Reliable backup on polish and consumables.

vendor.name: LumaTech Equipment
vendor.supplies: LED cure lamps, pedicure chairs, jet filters
vendor.standing: Source for the Wheaton build-out. Card balance being paid down.

vendor.name: Sanitas Spa Supply
vendor.supplies: Foot soak concentrate, sanitation and single-use supplies
vendor.standing: Used mainly for Orchard Plaza and Wheaton pedicure stock.

vendor.name: Ridgepoint Financial Services
vendor.services: Bookkeeping review, payroll filings, profit and loss, tax prep
vendor.standing: Handles the filings. Cecilia keeps her own eye on the dollar.

vendor.name: Prairie States Mutual Insurance
vendor.standing: Paid in full annually. Esthetic services must be reported before they begin.

preferences.rule: No financial commitment at or above $500 without Cecilia's approval.
Never switch nail-polish brands without extensive testing first.
Vendor and landlord outreach requires sign-off before it goes out.
